lessons.title: Contemporary Philippine Arts
lessons.description: Learn Contemporary Philippine Arts with focused discussion, examples, activity, and a 5-item quiz.
objectives: Understand key ideas in Contemporary Philippine Arts
Answer quiz items with evidence-based reasoning

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: This lesson introduces Contemporary Philippine Arts for Grade 10 MAPEH.

sections.heading: Main Discussion
sections.content: You will analyze key concepts, examples, and practical applications of Contemporary Philippine Arts.

sections.heading: Visual/Animated Explanation
sections.content: Visual guide for Contemporary Philippine Arts.

sections.heading: Guided Examples
items: Identify key ideas in Contemporary Philippine Arts.
Connect the concept to real life.

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: This lesson on Contemporary Philippine Arts covered the key ideas, examples, activity, and quiz feedback.

activity.instruction: Click each card to reveal explanation.

quiz.question: What is a key focus in Contemporary Philippine Arts?
choices: Understanding the concept and applying it
quiz.answer: Understanding the concept and applying it
quiz.explanation: This lesson emphasizes understanding and application.

quiz.question: Why are guided examples important?
quiz.explanation: Examples model correct thinking and process.

quiz.question: True or False: Feedback helps improve answers.
What should you do after answering a question?
